title: U-Shape Desk NLP205
brand_hint: Brand unknown — search title to identify manufacturer

specs.manufacturer: OTG / Offices to Go (a division of Global Furniture Group)
specs.dimensions: Bow front desk: 72"W x 42"D x 29.6"H; Credenza (with hutch): 72"W x 24"D x 65.6"H; Bridge: 42"W x 24"D; Overall U-shape footprint: approx. 72"W x 114"D x 29.6"H worksurface
specs.materials: Thermally fused laminate (TFL) top, 1" thick, on particleboard core; 2mm matching edgeband; steel frame and legs
key_features: Management U-shape suite with 72" bow front desk, rectangular credenza, open hutch, 42"x24" bridge, and box/box/file pedestal
Package components: NL7242BD bow front desk, NL7224C rectangular credenza, NL71HO open hutch, NL4224FB bridge top, NL23BBF box/box/file pedestal
Thermally fused laminate top, 1" thick with 2mm matching edgeband
Adjustable floor-leveling glides on all floor-contact components
Wire management grommets included on desk and credenza
Full height modesty panel on desk shell
Full-extension ball-bearing drawer slides on pedestal
Pedestal accepts letter/legal size files; includes key lock
Metal-to-metal connectors for quick and easy assembly
specs.warranty: OTG Limited Lifetime Warranty (non-moving parts: 5 years; moving parts including drawers, slides, leveling glides, locks: 2 years)
specs.notes: NLP205 is officially listed as 'Newland | Management U Shaped Suite with Bow Front Desk' on officestogo.com. The PDF spec sheet (EN_OTG_Desking_Tables_07_15_2024.pdf) confirms package contents. Overall weight not found on the NLP205-specific page; the closely analogous NLP201 (same desk + credenza + hutch + 2 pedestals) weighs 608 lbs — NLP205 with 1 pedestal will be somewhat less. The model codes listed beyond NLP205 are the individual component SKUs included in the package. Overall footprint depth of ~114" is inferred from bow desk (42"D) + bridge (24"D) + credenza (24"D) + assembly gap, consistent with NLP202R 72"Wx114"D listing for a comparable suite.
